problem: NSRulerView gutter has persistent layout bugs in SwiftUI NSViewRepresentable. Gutter model conflicts with infinite canvas aesthetic. Single-line bookmarks too granular for AI workflows.
solution: Replace NSRulerView with floating SwiftUI line numbers on infinite canvas, Liquid Glass bookmark bubbles for range bookmarks, corner badge collapse/expand toggle, AI context integration.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Remove NSRulerView, transparent canvas, LineLayoutState bridge

phases.name: Line Numbers + Toggle
phases.description: SwiftUI floating line number overlay, corner badge collapse/expand with spring animation

phases.name: Range Bookmarks
phases.description: Data model migration, Liquid Glass bubbles, click-drag interaction with auto-merge

phases.name: AI Integration
phases.description: Bookmark context in AI chat, GetBookmarkedSectionsTool FM tool

stories.title: Infinite Canvas Foundation
stories.description: Remove NSRulerView and make text view a transparent infinite canvas

stories.title: Line Layout Bridge
stories.description: Create shared @Observable LineLayoutState bridging NSLayoutManager to SwiftUI

stories.title: Floating Line Numbers
stories.description: SwiftUI overlay rendering line numbers via LineLayoutState

stories.title: Corner Badge Toggle
stories.description: Line count badge as collapse/expand toggle with spring animation

stories.title: Range Bookmark Data Model
stories.description: Migrate from single-line Bookmark to RangeBookmark with auto-merge

stories.title: Bookmark Bubble Visualization
stories.description: Liquid Glass bubbles behind bookmarked line ranges

stories.title: Bookmark Interaction
stories.description: Click-drag to create range bookmarks, hover-to-reveal delete

stories.title: AI Bookmark Context
stories.description: Auto-include bookmarked sections in AI chat, GetBookmarkedSectionsTool

designDecisions.title: Infinite Canvas
designDecisions.summary: NSTextView transparent, background owned by SwiftUI parent

designDecisions.title: Line Layout Bridge
designDecisions.summary: Shared @Observable LineLayoutState from NSLayoutManager to SwiftUI

designDecisions.title: Bookmark Visualization
designDecisions.summary: No bookmarks = no glass. Range bookmarks get Liquid Glass bubbles.

designDecisions.title: Collapse/Expand
designDecisions.summary: Corner line-count badge toggles. Collapsed = dot. Spring animation.

designDecisions.title: Coordinate Anchor
designDecisions.summary: Line indicators define text origin. Fixes clipping bug by design.

designDecisions.title: Range Storage
designDecisions.summary: startLine + endLine integers. Auto-merge overlapping ranges.

designDecisions.title: AI Integration
designDecisions.summary: Bookmarked sections auto-included in chat context. FM tool for programmatic access.

workingTreeNote: Current working tree has uncommitted GutteredScrollView and LineNumberRulerView.backgroundColor changes from earlier gutter fix session. These are SUPERSEDED by this spec — discard before implementation.
